description: Init download UX, update spec protection, and Windows encoding fixes
changelog:
**Enhancements:**
- feat(init): add proxy detection with undici ProxyAgent for fetch/giget network calls
- feat(init): add 5s timeout with live countdown for template index fetch
- feat(init): add 30s timeout for template downloads via Promise.race
- feat(init): show source URL and retry hint on download failure
- feat(init): eliminate double-fetch by passing pre-fetched SpecTemplate to downloadTemplateById
- feat(update): skip .feature/spec/ directory entirely — user-customized content is no longer overwritten
- feat(update): set up proxy before npm version check

**Bug Fixes:**
- fix(scripts): centralize Windows stdio UTF-8 encoding in common/__init__.py — adds stdin to fix garbled Chinese text when piping via stdin on Windows
- fix(scripts): remove inline encoding code from add_session.py and git_context.py
- fix(templates): remove auto-commit details from all 8 platform record-session templates to prevent AI misusing --no-commit flag

**Dependencies:**
- Add undici ^6.21.0 for ProxyAgent support
- Bump engines.node from >=18.0.0 to >=18.17.0 (required by undici v6)
notes: Run `feature update` to sync updated scripts and templates. Node.js >=18.17.0 is now required.
